reasoning_summary: ADANIPOWER: VWAP+RSI+VOLUME dual-confirm strategy optimized. Entry: both RSI>55 AND vol>1.2× required (reduces false signals). Stop: 0.8% ATR (breathable for power sector). Target: 4× ATR (optimal 3.67:1 R:R at 91.67% win rate). Optimal sessions: 10-11:30AM and 2-3PM IST. Groww place_bo integrated.
